subject: Warp 1.0.7 keeps crashing
body:
Dear community, 
   I just gave an initial test with Warp 1.0.7 using some unbinned K3 data, 
but it is either crashing, or working with no output and no GPU 
consumption. I'm using a single 2080 Ti. 
   Also, when I use Warp 1.0.7 to process some unbinned K2 data (which is 
working properly on Warp 1.0.6), it is still crashing when I choose 
"particle picking". 
   Is it just a special case, or is there anyone else encountering the same 
issue?
   Thank you so much for your help!

Best wishes, 
        Da
